The '''Battle of Mokk IX''' was a battle of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sometime before [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. In it, the forces of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] liberated the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] labor world of [[Mokk IX]]. [[Mirith Sinn]] was a soldier in the New Republic forces of the battle. In the aftermath of the battle, [[Sish Sadeet]] enlisted in the New Republic.<ref name="Handbook" />
